claims.claim: The stale semantic recovery-release transition should fade smoothly rather than cliff between 0.35 and 0.45 fill.
High-entropy semantic tokens at current fill should persist longer than low-entropy peers without exceeding bounded caps.
Changing stale constants, entropy full-support threshold, or `SHADOW_INFLUENCE` decay could make the response stronger.
claims.evidence_plan: Gate as live sensory retention/cadence behavior requiring Mike/operator approval, tests, and restart monitoring.
